title: weighted start states
manager: Weighted start states — a probabilistic initial distribution over which state a machine begins in, using the same weighted-LabelList rule as probabilistic transitions. This is what lets a machine model "starts in state A 70% of the time, B 30%," which matters for stochastic simulation and for modeling systems whose initial condition is itself uncertain rather than fixed.
cs: weighted `start_states` (the initial distribution), same LabelList normalization as probabilistic edges; fsl#414; the initial-distribution counterpart to weighted transitions.
